gachaName: Step Up Gacha with Hello, Happy World!
description: Featuring ★2 and higher members! (All members drop with their pre-Training images.)
annotation:
・Members are obtained according to the drop rates below.
・All members drop with their pre-Training images.
・For "★3+ Guaranteed" drops, please check the
　"Fixed Drop Rates."
・The percentages for drop rates per member are
　rounded up to four decimal places.
　As such, the totals displayed may not add up to 100%.

description:
When you play the Step Up Gacha with Hello, Happy World!, you will receive set rewards at each Step.
This gacha has 3 Steps. Each play moves you up one Step.
Each time the gacha is played, the number of Stars required and the Members that drop will change.
Play 1: Stars x250, 1 Member
Play 2: Stars x700, 3 Members
Play 3: Stars x1000, 5 Members 

The rewards for each Step are as follows.
Step 1: 10,000 Coins + 1 5th Anniversary Cake (Boost Drink)
Step 2: 25,000 Coins + 3 Skill Tickets (Double) + Special Stamp (Kokoro, Kaoru, Kanon, Hagumi, Misaki)
Step 3: 50,000 Coins + 5 Miracle Crystals + 1 Skill Ticket (Premium) + 2 5th Anniversary Cakes (Boost Drink)

Featuring ★2 and higher members!
New ★2 Member and all ★3 Members received come with a new costume!
notice:
・This gacha can only be played once during the campaign period.
・Free Stars will be used before Paid Stars.
・All members drop with their pre-Training images.
・Duplicate members may drop when playing the Gacha.
・Duplicate members will automatically be sent to the Waiting Room.
・Each individual drop is performed according to the Gacha drop rates. Example: 100 plays will not necessarily result in 1 drop of a member that has a 1% drop rate. 
・Limited Members and Collab Exclusive Members will not appear in this Gacha.
・Members from the Bear♡ Bear♡ Market Gacha will be featured in this gacha as well. However, drop rates will vary.
・For more on featured members and drop rates, check Gacha Details.
・Even in the event that the Gacha Results screen did not display because the app was forced to close or connection was interrupted, members will be obtained. Please check the Member List or the Waiting Room.
・Campaign schedule may be subject to change without prior notice.
